node.text: Dave plans to show Calvin around Boston, including places like Paradise Rock, House of Blues, and Fenway Park, known for their great music scene.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "music festival April 2023") on Session 3 (Score: 0.68)

node.text: Dave is looking forward to showing Calvin his favorite spots in Boston, especially in terms of food and music.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "music festival April 2023") on Session 3 (Score: 0.68)
